rulings.Case Title: LYNN KIM VS. DAVID ESLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees As Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 20, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF LYNN KIM's Motion For Attorneys Fees As Against Defendant DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show that defendants' action or tactic was (1) totally and completely without merit, measured by the objective, "reasonable attorney" standard, or (2) motivated solely by an intention to harass or cause unnecessary delay, measured by a subjective standard." Weisman v. Bower (1987) 193 Cal.App.3d 1231, 1237. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS MURRAY JR. VS. ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 20, 2013, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS MURRAY's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cause of action for Breach of Contract is not uncertain or unintelligible. The relation between two contracts and their alleged breach is sufficiently alleged to survive a demurrer pursuant to CCP 430.10(f). Categories and timeframe of damages caused by alleged fraud are sufficiently alleged. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that amount of such damages should also be alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 20, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF FARHAD ZAGHI Motion To Compel Compliance (Ccp Sec 2031.320) OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSALIND NG VS. LEVY, SHIRLEY E., EXECUTOR OF THE ESTATE OF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees Under Ccp Sec 405.38
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 20, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANTs LEVY and SHIRLEY E.'s, Motion For Attorneys Fees Under Ccp Sec 405.38 GRANTED in the total amount of $21,455 as follows: Watkins 5.8 hours at $425; Weiss 51.9 hours at $300; Byrne 3.4 hours at $300; Levy 4 hours at $300. No fees for Todd Robie. Robie's declaration does not specify hours, if any spent on "making or opposing motion." CCP 405.38. recovery for first appearance is denied without prejudice to include it in the Memorandum of Costs, if and when Defendant prevails in the matter. = (501/REQ)
